name: Developer Skill
description: Developer workflow cho mọi coding tasks — spawn Claude Code CLI, planning, branching, verification, dev preview, PR. Code trên container hoặc device qua SSH.

name: My Devices
description: Điều khiển thiết bị của user qua SSH — chạy lệnh, check thông tin, mở app

name: Skill Manager
description: Create, analyze, or improve OpenClaw skills — full lifecycle management with orchestrator pattern support, complexity scoring, and multi-round review.
